title: Medical device shortage: Accuflex 5 Flexible Digital Thermometer - Canada.ca
content:
## Medical device shortage: Accuflex 5 Flexible Digital Thermometer
The Accuflex 5 Flexible Digital Thermometer is currently reported as a medical device shortage through the Interim  Order to help prevent or alleviate shortages in relation to COVID-19 . For a full list of shortages, refer to the medical device shortages: list of shortages .
Posted on 2020-05-28
Actual medical device shortage
Accuflex 5 Flexible Digital Thermometer
1 thermometer per box
8505 Dalton Montreal, QC H4T 1V5
Increase in demand for the medical device
